final:
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire WE,  
    input wire RE,  
    input wire [7:0] D,  
    input wire [2:0] A,  
    output reg [7:0] Q  
);  
    reg [7:0] memory [7:0]; // 8-bit DRAM with 8 cells  
  
    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (WE) begin memory[A] <= D ; // Write data to the selected address
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= memory[A] ; // Read data from the selected address
  end
  end  
endmodule
